examples: The later species all depend on the preparations of the earlier one, for the actions of the zebra alter the vegetation to suit the stomachs of the wildebeest, topi, and gazelle.
Flocks of, say, starlings or herds of wildebeest do not count as real societies.
And though most of the wildebeest have yet to arrive, other animals crowd the plains.
This is actually what the mention, in his Principles, of hyenas savaging a wildebeest was about.
